User.title: User
User.description: Represents a user of the SaveBite application, including their role and basic profile information. Authentication details are handled externally by Firebase.

id.description: Unique identifier for the User entity.

name.description: The full name of the user or organization.

role.description: The role assigned to the user within the application (Store Owner, Customer, NGO, Admin).

address.description: The physical address of the user or organization, optional for customers.

phoneNumber.description: The contact phone number for the user or organization.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the user account was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the user account was last updated.

Product.title: Product
Product.description: Represents a food product managed by a Store Owner, including inventory details, expiry information, and status for sales or donations.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Product entity.

description.description: A detailed description of the product.

quantity.description: The current quantity of the product available in stock.

initialPrice.description: The original selling price of the product before any discounts.

currentPrice.description: The current selling price of the product, reflecting any applied discounts.

expiryDate.description: The expiration date of the product.

imageUrl.description: URL to an image of the product.

ownerId.description: Reference to the User who owns this product (StoreOwner). (Relationship: User 1:N Product)

status.description: The current status of the product, influencing its visibility in the marketplace or donation panel.

barcode.description: The barcode string for the product, if available.

lastAIRecommendation.description: The last action recommended by the AI (e.g., 'Discount', 'Donate').

recommendedActionDate.description: Timestamp when the AI last made a recommendation for this product.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the product was added to the inventory.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the product details were last updated.

StockImage.title: StockImage
StockImage.description: Represents a high-quality stock image uploaded by an Admin for use by store owners.

Order.title: Order
Order.description: Represents a customer's purchase request for one or more products from the marketplace.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Order entity.

customerId.description: Reference to the User who placed the order (Customer). (Relationship: User 1:N Order)

orderDate.description: Timestamp when the order was placed.

totalAmount.description: The total monetary amount of the order.

status.description: The current status of the order (e.g., Pending, Confirmed, Completed, Cancelled).

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the order record was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the order record was last updated.

OrderItem.title: OrderItem
OrderItem.description: Represents a single product item included within a specific customer order.

id.description: Unique identifier for the OrderItem entity.

orderId.description: Reference to the Order this item belongs to. (Relationship: Order 1:N OrderItem)

productId.description: Reference to the Product being purchased. (Relationship: Product 1:N OrderItem)

quantity.description: The quantity of the product ordered.

priceAtPurchase.description: The price of the product at the time of purchase for this specific item.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the order item record was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the order item record was last updated.

Donation.title: Donation
Donation.description: Represents a record of a food product being donated, tracking its claim and pickup status.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Donation entity.

productId.description: Reference to the Product being donated. (Relationship: Product 1:N Donation)

storeOwnerId.description: Reference to the User (StoreOwner) who is donating the product. (Relationship: User 1:N Donation)

ngoId.description: Reference to the User (NGO) who claimed or received the donation. (Relationship: User 1:N Donation)

quantity.description: The quantity of the product donated.

status.description: The current status of the donation (e.g., PendingClaim, Claimed, ScheduledForPickup, PickedUp, Cancelled).

claimDate.description: Timestamp when the donation was claimed by an NGO.

pickupScheduledDate.description: Timestamp when the pickup for the donation was scheduled.

pickupCompletedDate.description: Timestamp when the donation pickup was successfully completed.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the donation record was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the donation record was last updated.
